subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of God and guardeth His Testament! By thy life, verily the holy angels in Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی عهد الله و حمی میثاق الله لعمرک ان ملائکه القدس فی الفردوس
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
